title: Corporate Ministry
description: Organizational engagements to reshape culture, establish spiritual rhythms, and help your business become a mission field. Tory walks alongside your leadership team as a stewarding and shepherding presence — nurturing the spiritual health of your people and anchoring your culture in Kingdom values.
whoItIsFor: Organizations whose culture doesn't match their values — or faith-driven businesses that want to build something intentional from the start.
includes: Bible study and corporate prayer facilitation
